title: Setup Docker Swarm on 3 Raspberry Pis
description: Configure Docker Swarm cluster on Pi nodes: 192.168.4.38 (lucidia - manager), 192.168.4.64 (blackroad-pi - worker), 192.168.4.99 (lucidia-alt - worker). Deploy lightweight products: RoadMonitor, RoadAPI, RoadStatus. Setup Traefik load balancer.
